titleStmt.title: SII 24.464: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 464. (A.R. No. 48 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, VĒDAPĀRĀYAṆA-MAṆḌAPAM, TIERS.

summary.p: Records the gift of two villages Teṉśēri and Kāṭṭuvari of Veṇbā-nāḍu in Pulipuṟambūr-kūṟṟam by Śūrappa-nāyāka. son of Āryakshatrakulamaṇi puravarādhīśvara ••• Aḍappam Peddappa-nāyakkar of Kāśyapa-gōtra. Pulipuṟambūr-kūṟṟam is stated to be a Nāyakkattanam of the donor. The king's name has been erased. However the details of the date given viz., Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Makara, ba. 3 Thursday, Maghā, regularly correspond to 1547 A.D., December 29, Thursday ·37; ·90.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran śrīvīrapratāpa^1^ pṛthivīrājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 6 10 9ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa pilavaṅka samvatsarattu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tadikaiyum guruvāramum peṟṟa makānakṣatrattunāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulāśanivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟā vitivaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati śrīmatkāśyapa gotrattu Āryakṣatrakula [maṇi]
puravarādhiśvara raṅgabhīmasīḍu govinda rirāya śrīmat Aṭappam pettappa nāyakkar putran cūrappa nāyakkar teṇṭan samarppitta dharmmasādhanam paṇṇina tettamm nammuṭaiya nāyakkattanam Āṉa pulipuṟampūr kūṟṟañca veṇpānāṭṭu teṉceri kāṭṭuvarikiṟāmam § Inta kiṟāmam Iraṇṭuk kum nattam paṭukai Āyam makamai talaiyārikkam nalle
talanel cakalātāyamum Uḷpaṭa 9ma poṉ 100 2 10 Intap poṉ nūṟṟu Irupatum kovil paṇṭārattile mutaliṭṭuk koṇṭu nāḷoṉṟukku Amutu ceytaruḷum campā taḷikai 3 Ittaḷikaimuṉṟukkum Amutupaṭi neyyamutu kaṟiyamutu paṭi campāramum Uḷpaṭa koyil paṇṭārattile viṭṭu nāḷ toṟum cantrātittavarai keṅkaikaraiyil kārāmpacuvai ko
pokak kaṭavaṉākavum dāṉapālanayormmadhye dānāt śreyonpālanam . padam Inta śilāśāsa- ṉam Eḻutina ṉāyakka koyil kaṇakku śrīrāganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu . §There is another line of writing below this, much damaged.
Digital edition of SII 24.464 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
